creative_premise: A hidden second chamber should be earned through play rather than exposed as ordinary navigation: after three pressure-written weather notes, the bell reveals Afterbell, a room for the echoes left behind.

behavior: Afterbell begins hidden and outside keyboard order
three pressure-written weather notes reveal the chamber
the reveal is announced through the existing polite live region
the revealed chamber becomes keyboard reachable
the A key opens the chamber only after it has been earned
erasing the weather score closes the threshold again
reveal motion is disabled under prefers-reduced-motion
